name: django-smoke-alarm
description: Run and triage Django/DRF security smoke checks into real risks, hygiene, and false positives using clean-scan discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Run and triage Django/DRF security smoke checks into real risks, hygiene, and false positives using clean-scan discipline.
interface.longDescription: Run and triage Django/DRF security smoke checks into real risks, hygiene, and false positives using clean-scan discipline. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Run a Django smoke-alarm pass on this project. Use a clean scan, exclude worktrees/vendor/generated folders, and classify findings as REAL, HYGIENE, or FALSE POSITIVE with file-line evidence.
